Operation 'addUsersToClass' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.current_summary: Enroll users in a class with specific roles
data.description_suggestion: Adds one or more users to an existing class with specified roles (e.g., instructor, student, teaching assistant). Requires authentication and valid clientId and classId path parameters. The request body should contain an array of user IDs and their corresponding roles. Returns a success response confirming the enrollment. Users will immediately gain access to the class and associated materials based on their assigned role.
data.reasoning: The summary is clear and action-oriented, but the description is completely empty. Added comprehensive description explaining: what the operation does (adds users with roles), required authentication and parameters, expected input format (array of users with roles), return value (success confirmation), and side effects (immediate access to class). This enables AI agents to understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'removeUsersFromClass' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The summary is clear and action-oriented, but the description is empty. Added comprehensive description explaining: what the operation does (removes users and revokes access), required authentication and parameters, expected input format (array of user IDs), return value (success confirmation), and side effects (immediate access revocation and roster removal). This provides AI agents with clear understanding of the operation's purpose and effects.

data.description_suggestion: Removes one or more users from an enrolled class, revoking their access to class materials and sessions. Requires authentication and valid clientId and classId path parameters. The request body should contain an array of user IDs to be removed. Returns a success response confirming the removal. Removed users will lose access to the class immediately and will no longer appear in the class enrollment roster.
data.reasoning: The summary is clear and action-oriented, but the description is empty. message: Operation 'generateAccessToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is completely missing. Added details about what the operation does (JWT to OAuth exchange), required inputs (TokenRequest structure), expected outputs (TokenResponse with token details), token expiration context (60 minutes per security scheme), and how to use the returned token. data.current_summary: Exchange JWT for OAuth access token
data.description_suggestion: Exchanges client credentials for an OAuth 2.0 Bearer token using JWT. Requires a valid TokenRequest with clientId and credentials. Returns a TokenResponse containing the access token, token type, expiration time (60 minutes), and refresh token. The returned token must be included in the Authorization header for subsequent API requests.
data.reasoning: Description is completely missing. Added details about what the operation does (JWT to OAuth exchange), required inputs (TokenRequest structure), expected outputs (TokenResponse with token details), token expiration context (60 minutes per security scheme), and how to use the returned token. data.current_summary: Create a new user in the organization
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new user account in the organization. Accepts a CreateUserRequest containing user details (name, email, role, contact information, etc.). Returns a CreateUserResponse with the newly created user's ID and confirmation. Requires Bearer token authentication. The new user is immediately available for class enrollment and can log in after account creation.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing user's information by userId. Accepts an UpdateUserRequest with user details to modify (name, email, role, contact information, etc.). data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a user account by userId. This action is irreversible and cannot be undone. Requires Bearer token authentication. Returns a SuccessMessage confirming deletion. Side effects: the user is immediately removed from all enrolled classes, their account becomes inaccessible, and all associated user data is deleted from the system.

data.current_summary: Create a one-time or recurring class session
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new class session scheduled by an instructor. Accepts a ScheduleClassRequest containing class details (title, description, schedule, recurrence settings, capacity, etc.). Returns a ClassResponse with the created class ID and details. Requires Bearer token authentication and valid instructorId. Supports both one-time and recurring class configurations. The class is immediately available for student enrollment.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. data.description_suggestion: Modifies an existing class's settings by classId. Accepts an EditClassRequest with class details to update (title, description, schedule, capacity, etc.). Returns a ClassResponse with the updated class information. Requires Bearer token authentication. Note: class type (one-time vs. recurring) cannot be changed after creation. Changes take effect immediately and affect all enrolled students.

data.current_summary: Permanently remove a class and all associated data
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a class and all associated data by classId. This action is irreversible. Requires Bearer token authentication. Returns a SuccessMessage confirming deletion. Side effects: all enrolled students are unenrolled, class sessions are cancelled, and all class-related data (recordings, materials, attendance records) is permanently removed from the system.
